calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-17-2025 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Sep-10-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 514; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 09:58:53 a.m. and concluding at 10:15:31 a.m.

Plaintiff San Francisco Federal Credit Union represented by Roger Jackson, Esq.
Defendant David Howard Poston AKA Rhoyal D Foston AKA Rhoyalbaibe D H Foston not appearing.

WILLIAM COOPER IS SWORN TO TESTIFY.

10:00 a.m. - WILLIAM COOPER testifies on behalf of Plaintiff under direct examination.

THE FOLLOWING EXHIBITS ARE MARKED/ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE:

Plaintiff's Exhibit No. 1 - Loan and Security Agreements and Disclosure Statement
Plaintiff's Exhibit No. 2 - Line of Credit Agreement and Disclosure

10:12 a.m. - The Complaint filed Jul-11-2024 is true and correct. Based on the testimony provided by William Cooper, the Collections Manager and Custodian of Records for Plaintiff, Court finds sufficient evidence to warrant judgment in the amount shown by the ledgers and the testimony of Mr. Cooper.

Default as to Defendant David Howard Poston AKA Rhoyal D Foston AKA Rhoyalbaibe D H Foston entered on May-02-2025. If judgmemt enters, it would resolve the entire action.

JUDGMENT IS HEREBY ENTERED IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION AND AGAINST DEFENDANT DAVID HOWARD POSTON AKA RHOYAL D FOSTON AKA RHOYALBAIBE D H FOSTON AS FOLLOWS:

DAMAGES: $37,586.87
PREJUDGMENT INTEREST: $8,534.12
ATTORNEY FEES: $3,900.00
COSTS: $1,391.52

TOTAL JUDGMENT = $51, 412.51
Proposed judgment signed and filed in open court.
